mapper.select:
SELECT IDX, MENU_ID, TITLE, WRITER, READCOUNT, ( SELECT COUNT( FILE_NUM ) FROM FILES F WHERE F.IDX = B.IDX ) FILESCOUNT, TO_CHAR(REGDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') REGDATE
FROM BOARD B
WHERE MENU_ID = #{menu_id}
ORDER BY NREF DESC, STEP ASC

SELECT COUNT( IDX ) AS TOTALCOUNT FROM BOARD
WHERE MENU_ID = #{ menu_id }
SELECT IDX, MENU_ID, TITLE, CONT, WRITER, READCOUNT, TO_CHAR(REGDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') REGDATE FROM BOARD WHERE BNO = #{ bno }
SELECT FILE_NUM, IDX, FILENAME, FILEEXT, SFILENAME FROM FILES WHERE BNO = #{ bno } ORDER BY FILE_NUM ASC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM FILES WHERE BNO = #{ bno }
DELETE FROM FILES WHERE FILE_NUM = #{ file_num }
DELETE FROM BOARD WHERE BNO = #{ bno }
